text_block_list.text: One day, while walking near the arcade in the mall—

text_block_list.name: Protesting Boy
text_block_list.text: Hey, let me play too! There are only two of these arcade cabinets, you know!

text_block_list.name: Bratty Kid
text_block_list.text: Heh, scrubs like you should back off! Weaklings don't have the right to play!

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: —Excuse me. Do you have a moment…?

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
I think it would be much more peaceful—
and fun if everyone got along and took turns using it…

text_block_list.name: Bratty Kid
text_block_list.text: Haaah～? Shut up! If you want me to move, try and beat me!

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: Umm—so, if I can play this game, you will listen to what I have to say, correct?
choice_data_list: <size=38>…Can you play? It looks like a fighting game</size>

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: ……I'm not very confident, but… I must at least make an effort to bridge the gap.

And so, Curren Bouquetd'or challenged 
him with unfamiliar hands, but—

text_block_list.name: Bratty Kid
text_block_list.text: Heh, you can't even land a single attack, let alone put up a fight! Learn how to throw a punch before you come back!

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
…I'm sorry. Even though it's just a game— 
I can't help but hesitate to use violence.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: But… I have to attack… The opponent's character to win. …Hmm—

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: ……I will try to find a way somehow.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: …I see. A secret trick like this—I should write this down…

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: …Just as the rumors said, it seems this store has a lot of cabinets for that game. I'll train here and—
And so—the time for the rematch had arrived. The promise was that if Curren Bouquetd'or won, the children would get along and take turns.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: Well then—I look forward to our match.

text_block_list.name: Bratty Kid
text_block_list.text: Ora ora! Big Bang Thousand-Armed Hand! Lightning Vortex Thunder Kick!!

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: Ngh, hup… Hup…!

text_block_list.name: Spectating Children
text_block_list.text: Wh-What!? She's dodging every single attack by bowing at the exact right time!?

text_block_list.name: Bratty Kid
text_block_list.text: Ugh, bobbing up and down like a bamboo fountain! But you can't win just by dodging!

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
…Almost there, 20 consecutive dodges…! 
—Now!

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
↑, ↓, ↓, ←, A, B, B, →… 
Secret command, activate!!

text_block_list.name: Bouquet's Character
text_block_list.text:
Your fists are tainted with wicked thoughts… From now on… 
You must use those fists for love!

text_block_list.name: Bratty Kid
text_block_list.text:
Wha!? M-My character… 
Became a monk!?

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
This character is a monk, you see… 
So by dodging 20 times in a row, he can 
persuade the opponent and win—it's a hidden move.

text_block_list.name: Bratty Kid
text_block_list.text: Th-That's not fair! You're banned from using that character next time!

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: Yes… That is not a problem.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
…On this stage, I can use that move. 
While dodging with perfect bows—

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: B, →, →, A, A, A, ←… Borrowing a smartphone from the spectators in the background—『Dial 911』activated!!

text_block_list.name: Bratty Kid
text_block_list.text:
Wh… What!? My character got hauled 
away in a police car!?

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: …How was that? I believe this makes it… Two wins in a row.

text_block_list.name: Bratty Kid
text_block_list.text:
A-Amazing～! Miss, 
how do you know so many secret moves!?

text_block_list.name: Excited Children
text_block_list.text:
『Teach me, teach me!』
『M-Me too!』

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Of course, I don't mind. 
…But.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
—From now on, you must all take turns 
and use the cabinet nicely. Promise?
choice_data_list: <size=34>You did great, considering you're not used to this</size>
<size=34>You did great, considering you're not used to this</size>

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: —From now on, you must all take turns and use the cabinet nicely. Promise?
choice_data_list: <size=34>You did great, considering you're not used to this</size>
<size=34>You did great, considering you're not used to this</size>

text_block_list.name: Excited Children
text_block_list.text:
『Yeeees!』『Got it!』
『Hurry up and teach us!』
『Hey! I'm first!』

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: Hehe, it's alright… I will teach each of you properly, one by one—

Despite it being a genre she had no connection to, through her efforts, 
Curren Bouquetd'or had masterfully "bundled" the children together.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: It took some time, but… It has a lot of depth, so it wasn't difficult.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: Persuading your opponent and winning without hurting them… I never knew such a method existed in fighting games.
choice_data_list: <size=40>…I think it's just this game that's special</size>

text_block_list.text: In any case, Curren Bouquetd'or had smoothly mediated the conflict and restored harmony.
